using Namotion.Interceptor;
using Namotion.Interceptor.Interceptors;

using System;
using System.Collections.Concurrent;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Collections.Frozen;
using System.ComponentModel;
using System.Linq;
using System.Reflection;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
using System.Text.Json.Serialization;

#pragma warning disable CS8669
#pragma warning disable CS0649
#pragma warning disable CS0067

namespace YourDefaultNamespace
{
    public partial class Light : IInterceptorSubject, INotifyPropertyChanged, IRaisePropertyChanged
    {
        public event PropertyChangedEventHandler? PropertyChanged;

        [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
        protected void RaisePropertyChanged(string propertyName) => PropertyChanged?.Invoke(this, PropertyChangedEventArgsCache.Get(propertyName));

        void IRaisePropertyChanged.RaisePropertyChanged(string propertyName) => RaisePropertyChanged(propertyName);

        private IInterceptorExecutor? _context;
        private IReadOnlyDictionary<string, SubjectPropertyMetadata>? _properties;

        [JsonIgnore]
        IInterceptorSubjectContext IInterceptorSubject.Context => _context ??= new InterceptorExecutor(this);

        [JsonIgnore]
        ConcurrentDictionary<(string? property, string key), object?> IInterceptorSubject.Data { get; } = new();

        [JsonIgnore]
        IReadOnlyDictionary<string, SubjectPropertyMetadata> IInterceptorSubject.Properties => _properties ?? DefaultProperties;

        [JsonIgnore]
        object IInterceptorSubject.SyncRoot { get; } = new object();

        void IInterceptorSubject.AddProperties(params IEnumerable<SubjectPropertyMetadata> properties)
        {
            _properties = (_properties ?? DefaultProperties)
                .Concat(properties.Select(p => new KeyValuePair<string, SubjectPropertyMetadata>(p.Name, p)))
                .ToFrozenDictionary();
        }

        public static IReadOnlyDictionary<string, SubjectPropertyMetadata> DefaultProperties { get; } =
            new Dictionary<string, SubjectPropertyMetadata>
            {
                {
                    "Name",
                    new SubjectPropertyMetadata(
                        typeof(Light).GetProperty(nameof(Name), BindingFlags.Public | BindingFlags.NonPublic | BindingFlags.Instance)!,
                        (o) => ((Light)o).Name,
                        (o, v) => ((Light)o).Name = (string)v,
                        isIntercepted: true,
                        isDynamic: false)
                },
                {
                    "On",
                    new SubjectPropertyMetadata(
                        typeof(Light).GetProperty(nameof(On), BindingFlags.Public | BindingFlags.NonPublic | BindingFlags.Instance)!,
                        (o) => ((Light)o).On,
                        (o, v) => ((Light)o).On = (bool)v,
                        isIntercepted: true,
                        isDynamic: false)
                },
            }
            .ToFrozenDictionary();

        public Light()
        {
        }

        public Light(IInterceptorSubjectContext context) : this()
        {
            ((IInterceptorSubject)this).Context.AddFallbackContext(context);
        }

        private string _Name;

        public partial string Name
        {
            get
            {
                return GetPropertyValue<string>(nameof(Name), static (o) => ((Light)o)._Name);
            }
            set
            {
                var newValue = value;
                var cancel = false;
                OnNameChanging(ref newValue, ref cancel);
                if (!cancel && SetPropertyValue(nameof(Name), newValue, _Name, static (o, v) => ((Light)o)._Name = v))
                {
                    OnNameChanged(_Name);
                    RaisePropertyChanged(nameof(Name));
                }
            }
        }

        partial void OnNameChanging(ref string newValue, ref bool cancel);

        partial void OnNameChanged(string newValue);

        private bool _On;

        public partial bool On
        {
            get
            {
                return GetPropertyValue<bool>(nameof(On), static (o) => ((Light)o)._On);
            }
            set
            {
                var newValue = value;
                var cancel = false;
                OnOnChanging(ref newValue, ref cancel);
                if (!cancel && SetPropertyValue(nameof(On), newValue, _On, static (o, v) => ((Light)o)._On = v))
                {
                    OnOnChanged(_On);
                    RaisePropertyChanged(nameof(On));
                }
            }
        }

        partial void OnOnChanging(ref bool newValue, ref bool cancel);

        partial void OnOnChanged(bool newValue);

        [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
        private TProperty GetPropertyValue<TProperty>(string propertyName, Func<IInterceptorSubject, TProperty> readValue)
        {
            return _context is not null ? _context.GetPropertyValue(propertyName, readValue)! : readValue(this)!;
        }

        [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
        private bool SetPropertyValue<TProperty>(string propertyName, TProperty newValue, TProperty currentValue, Action<IInterceptorSubject, TProperty> setValue)
        {
            if (_context is null)
            {
                setValue(this, newValue);
                return true;
            }
            else
            {
                return _context.SetPropertyValue(propertyName, newValue, currentValue, setValue);
            }
        }

        [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
        private object? InvokeMethod(string methodName, Func<IInterceptorSubject, object?[], object?> invokeMethod, params object?[] parameters)
        {
            return _context is not null ? _context.InvokeMethod(methodName, parameters, invokeMethod) : invokeMethod(this, parameters);
        }
    }
}

using Namotion.Interceptor;
using Namotion.Interceptor.Interceptors;

using System;
using System.Collections.Concurrent;
using System.Collections.Generic;

using System.Linq;
using System.Reflection;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
using System.Text.Json.Serialization;

#pragma warning disable CS8669
#pragma warning disable CS0649
#pragma warning disable CS0067

namespace YourDefaultNamespace
{
    public partial class DimmableLight : IInterceptorSubject
    {
        private IInterceptorExecutor? _context;
        private IReadOnlyDictionary<string, SubjectPropertyMetadata>? _properties;

        [JsonIgnore]
        IInterceptorSubjectContext IInterceptorSubject.Context => _context ??= new InterceptorExecutor(this);

        [JsonIgnore]
        ConcurrentDictionary<(string? property, string key), object?> IInterceptorSubject.Data { get; } = new();

        [JsonIgnore]
        IReadOnlyDictionary<string, SubjectPropertyMetadata> IInterceptorSubject.Properties => _properties ?? DefaultProperties;

        [JsonIgnore]
        object IInterceptorSubject.SyncRoot { get; } = new object();

        void IInterceptorSubject.AddProperties(params IEnumerable<SubjectPropertyMetadata> properties)
        {
            _properties = (_properties ?? DefaultProperties)
                .Concat(properties.Select(p => new KeyValuePair<string, SubjectPropertyMetadata>(p.Name, p)))
                .ToFrozenDictionary();
        }

        public new static IReadOnlyDictionary<string, SubjectPropertyMetadata> DefaultProperties { get; } =
            new Dictionary<string, SubjectPropertyMetadata>
            {
                {
                    "Brightness",
                    new SubjectPropertyMetadata(
                        typeof(DimmableLight).GetProperty(nameof(Brightness), BindingFlags.Public | BindingFlags.NonPublic | BindingFlags.Instance)!,
                        (o) => ((DimmableLight)o).Brightness,
                        (o, v) => ((DimmableLight)o).Brightness = (double)v,
                        isIntercepted: true,
                        isDynamic: false)
                },
            }
            .Concat(global::Light.DefaultProperties)
            .ToFrozenDictionary();

        public DimmableLight()
        {
        }

        public DimmableLight(IInterceptorSubjectContext context) : this()
        {
            ((IInterceptorSubject)this).Context.AddFallbackContext(context);
        }

        private double _Brightness;

        public partial double Brightness
        {
            get
            {
                return GetPropertyValue<double>(nameof(Brightness), static (o) => ((DimmableLight)o)._Brightness);
            }
            set
            {
                var newValue = value;
                var cancel = false;
                OnBrightnessChanging(ref newValue, ref cancel);
                if (!cancel && SetPropertyValue(nameof(Brightness), newValue, _Brightness, static (o, v) => ((DimmableLight)o)._Brightness = v))
                {
                    OnBrightnessChanged(_Brightness);
                    RaisePropertyChanged(nameof(Brightness));
                }
            }
        }

        partial void OnBrightnessChanging(ref double newValue, ref bool cancel);

        partial void OnBrightnessChanged(double newValue);

        [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
        private TProperty GetPropertyValue<TProperty>(string propertyName, Func<IInterceptorSubject, TProperty> readValue)
        {
            return _context is not null ? _context.GetPropertyValue(propertyName, readValue)! : readValue(this)!;
        }

        [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
        private bool SetPropertyValue<TProperty>(string propertyName, TProperty newValue, TProperty currentValue, Action<IInterceptorSubject, TProperty> setValue)
        {
            if (_context is null)
            {
                setValue(this, newValue);
                return true;
            }
            else
            {
                return _context.SetPropertyValue(propertyName, newValue, currentValue, setValue);
            }
        }

        [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
        private object? InvokeMethod(string methodName, Func<IInterceptorSubject, object?[], object?> invokeMethod, params object?[] parameters)
        {
            return _context is not null ? _context.InvokeMethod(methodName, parameters, invokeMethod) : invokeMethod(this, parameters);
        }
    }
}
